name: constellation
description: Live multi-agent orchestration: WebSocket server + A2A messaging + dashboard + Stop hook helper + MCP server (full Phase 2 impl: WS proxy + 5 tools incl. a2a_wait_ack 3-tier + session-lifecycle + §13.13.2 dedup + chunked transfer reassembly). Bundles the v2.5.x reference runtime, the v2.5.3 SSoT-compliant gateway-client, the v0.4 MCP integration (§8), the v2.5.8 cross-environment Stop hook helper, the v2.5.10 attachment transport-mode (§13.11 rule 5), and the v2.5.11 at-least-once relay reliability (§13.13.2). Plugin v0.2.0 = Phase 2 production-ready (npm dep: ws ^8.18.0).
